artifact_classification: authoritative for bounded S10R-006-R6-A selection only

options.label: Bounded Corner-Ownership Rule-Contract Route
options.route: Authorize later preparation only of one separate bounded cross-view corner-ownership rule contract.
options.evidence_basis: Approved Step 05 cardinal axes plus the bounded R5 four-arc/four-gap symbolic structure.
options.authority_limit: No gap point, q value, interval, owner, seam, join, closure, evaluation, field, or implementation is authorized.
options.block_effect_if_selected: S10R-BLOCK-006 changes only to active_pending_separate_cross_view_corner_ownership_rule_contract; no block resolves.
known_risks: An abstract rule could be deterministic without being physical source correspondence.
Historical I10-010-A requires revision and cannot be copied forward as authority.
Later rule design could imply seams or closure unless explicitly bounded.
Proof-only back/right records could be mistaken for construction ownership.

options.label: Preserve Four Unowned Corner Gaps
options.route: Do not authorize corner-ownership rule-contract preparation; preserve G_0 through G_3 as unowned and blocked.
options.evidence_basis: R5 explicitly leaves every gap unowned and no current corner rule exists.
options.authority_limit: No new preparation or corner-ownership authority.
known_risks: Joined transition ownership cannot advance while the four corners remain unowned.

candidate_recommendation.reason: It is the smallest bounded gate that permits a later visible and rejectable revised rule proposal without assigning any corner.

selection_record.approval_context: Direct response to the exact R6-A or R6-BLOCK option decision question and the evidence-based recommendation of R6-A.
selection_record.authority_granted: preparation only of one separate bounded cross-view corner-ownership rule contract
